body_txt: There are Cool Shades and there are Sinister Shades . There are Nerd Glasses and there are Bespectacled Cutie round glasses. And then there are these. Perhaps it's the bright pink lenses. Perhaps it's the rhinestone-encrusted frames. Perhaps it's the way they jut out several feet from the wearer's face. Whatever it is these glasses have, the one thing they do not have is subtlety. These glasses come in a mix-and-match variety of styles, depending on the effect the costume department is going for:
